dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.publication

Class JkPomMetadata

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.publication.JkPomMetadata
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable

    public final class JkPomMetadata
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.io.Serializable
    These are extra information required to publish on Maven central.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
